text:
L0200G_DNTL_UNK_CD L0200G Dental Status: Unable to Examine Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the staff was unable to examine the resident's oral/dental status. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
407 L0200Z_NO_DNTL_CD L0200Z_NO_DNTL_CD L0200Z Dental Status: None of Above Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the resident had none of the above dental issues present. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
408
